_comment: Cella delegate roster. Copy to roster.json, fill in your body's delegates,
address     — the delegate's Cardano wallet address (bech32, addr1... or stake1...).
This is how Cella recognises them when they sign in: the public key
inside their wallet signature must hash to a credential this address
carries. A delegate with no address cannot sign in with a wallet.
voteKeyHash — the delegate's on-chain voting credential (hex, blake2b-224). This is
the key hash that appears in the hot NFT datum's voting group and that
signs the committee's vote transaction. It is usually NOT the same key
as the wallet: the wallet gets a delegate into Cella, the voting key
gets the committee's vote onto the chain. Leave it out until you have it.
name: Cardano Curia
blurb: A consortium that deliberates on Cardano governance actions, assesses their constitutionality, and casts a single committee vote with a shared rationale.
